summary: Forensic report documenting Wincham's false advertising of ITP (Impuesto de Transmisiones Patrimoniales) property transfer tax savings. Includes: timeline of when Wincham started operating the UK limited company scheme (1994, marketed actively from ~2009), full ITP rate table for all 17 Spanish autonomous communities + Canary Islands as of April 2026, legal governance of ITP (devolved to Autonomous Communities), and a precise financial calculation showing Wincham misrepresented a 16.5% saving to Philip Harrison when the Lanzarote ITP rate was only 6.5%, creating a false saving discrepancy of €18,500 on the €185,000 purchase.
